---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to add.

## Problem It Solves
Describe the problem this feature would solve or how it would improve the course.

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like the feature to work.

## Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the feature request here.

## Examples
Links to similar features or examples if available.
